meetings.title: past
meetings.description: notify: will notify and mark as soon. begin: will begin and be removed

meetings.title: past, has soon, daily, multiple participants
meetings.description: notify: will not notify since marked as soon. begin: will begin, be removed, and be cloned tomorrow

meetings.title: past, weekly, paused, no participants
meetings.description: notify: will not notify since paused, will mark as soon. begin: will not begin since paused, will be removed, will be cloned next week

meetings.title: soon, canceled
meetings.description: notify: will not notify since canceled, will mark as soon
